default_policy: Use CFS_FSW as the fixed flight-software path.
Prefer workspace-local ADCS FSW changes before native 42 truth-model changes.
Do not report sidecar or surrogate behavior as native 42 support.

new_sensor_preprocessing: ADCS/include/AcTypes.h when new AcType fields are required

supported_inside_cfs_fsw: mode and fallback changes using existing AcType fields
control laws that output to Tcmd, Mcmd, Fcmd, IdealTrq, or IdealFrc
sensor preprocessing from existing AcType sensor mirrors
wheel, MTB, thruster, and ideal actuator allocation changes
new internal state fields when initialization, zeroing, mapping, and build impacts are handled

cross_boundary_rules.sidecar_bridge: Using existing sidecar outputs as FSW inputs is cross_boundary; editing codex_web/AIGNC/bridge/mission_bypass requires explicit user approval.
cross_boundary_rules.adapter_changes: Changing SCType <-> AcType mapping is cross_boundary unless limited to workspace-local 42fsw.c and declared in the architecture plan.
cross_boundary_rules.joint_control: Default shell mirrors joint state but does not dispatch joint commands; classify joint command work as cross_boundary until actuator and truth-model ownership is explicit.

verification_requirements: attitude, angular-rate, and actuator-output plot review
configuration validation and runtime evidence when config or truth-model boundaries are touched
